basic_details.job_title: YIL Secretarial Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Yantra India Limited (YIL) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Secretarial Assistant Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 64 years Up to 69 years in exceptional cases with approval of competent authority.

qualification.education_qualification: Matriculation, Retired from Central Govt in Secretarial Staff cadre
qualification.details: Matriculation and retired from Central Govt in Secretarial Staff cadre.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per DoPT OM No. 3-25/2020-E.III.A, Dt.09/12/2020 based on last pay drawn at retirement subject to ceiling
salary_details.details: As per DoPT OM No. 3-25/2020-E.III.A, Dt.09/12/2020 based on last pay drawn at retirement subject to ceiling.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:https://ddpdoo.gov.in .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: YIL Secretarial Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the YIL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download YIL Secretarial Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Matriculation and retired from Central Govt in Secretarial Staff cadre.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 64 years Up to 69 years in exceptional cases with approval of competent authority.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: As per DoPT OM No. 3-25/2020-E.III.A, Dt.09/12/2020 based on last pay drawn at retirement subject to ceiling.

content_sections.heading: YIL Secretarial Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Applications
rows.date: 15 days from date of Advertisement in Employment News.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website:https://ddpdoo.gov.in . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: YIL Secretarial Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the YIL Secretarial Assistant post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the YIL Secretarial Assistant post is 03-07-2026. Candidates are advised to send their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Secretarial Assistant role at YIL?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Secretarial Assistant position, candidates must have completed Matriculation and retired from the Central Government in the Secretarial Staff cadre.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Secretarial Assistant post is 64 years. In exceptional cases, age relaxation up to 69 years may be granted with the approval of the competent authority.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Secretarial Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Secretarial Assistant post involves two main stages: Application Scrutiny, followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered.

faq.question: Q6. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job for the Secretarial Assistant post at Yantra India Limited is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the job location?
faq.answer: The job is located in Nagpur, Maharashtra, with the pincode 440021.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for this post?
faq.answer: The salary will be determined based on the DoPT OM No. 3-25/2020-E.III.A, dated 09/12/2020, and will be based on the last pay drawn at retirement, subject to a ceiling.

faq.question: Q9. How can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Yantra India Limited. The link will be provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, including a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates, along with the filled application form.
